about_us.description: Three brothers, together with their families, have always had a deep passion for traditional Swedish candy and chocolate – the kind of treats that make Swedish candy so unique and beloved. After years of traveling, they decided it was time to bring this unforgettable taste experience to the Middle East. Their mission is simple: to let more people discover the incredible flavors of Swedish loose candy, chocolates, and sweet treats. Picked with love, mixed with happiness – every treat in our collection is carefully selected to bring a little piece of Swedish joy to you. It’s more than just candy; it’s an experience. A way to enjoy the tastes and feelings that make Swedish homes so special, now available in Dubai. Goodiset is all about making memories with family and friends, sharing incredible moments over delicious treats. Whether you're looking for something classic or curious to try something new, there's something for everyone here. We are sure that you’ll find something you love – and probably something you’ll want to share!
about_us.sweet_journey_description: At Goodiset, we bring the vibrant tradition of Swedish confectionery to Dubai, offering an unmatched selection of sweets that cater to every taste and dietary preference. From the beloved ‘Saturday Candy’ custom to vegan and gelatin-free delights, our candy is crafted to be enjoyed by everyone. Immerse yourself in a world where quality and inclusivity meet to create a truly unique candy experience.
about_us.craft_your_candy_description: Whether you love sweet, sour, or a mix of both, our ‘Pick & Mix’ concept lets you customize your candy selection to suit your cravings. Dive into a world of flavors and make every bag uniquely yours.
about_us.halal_description: All our candy is completely free from gelatin and any animal-derived oils. Enjoy with confidence!
about_us.treats_for_every_occasion_descr: Add a touch of sweetness to your events! We offer personalized candy solutions for weddings, parties, and corporate gatherings, making every celebration truly unique and memorable.
about_us.delivery_description: Enjoy fast delivery within 90 minutes in Dubai, next-day delivery across the UAE, and 3 to 5 days shipping across the GCC.
terms.intro_paragraph: At Goodiset, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This Terms outlines how we collect, use, disclose, and protect the information you provide to us through our website, mobile applications, and other online services.
terms.personal_info_paragraph: We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, postal address, and phone number when you place an order, register an account, subscribe to our newsletter, participate in surveys or promotions, or interact with our website or customer support.
terms.usage_info_paragraph: We collect certain non-personal information automatically when you visit our website, including your IP address, browser type, operating system, referring URLs, and pages viewed. We may also use cookies and similar technologies to collect this information.
terms.personal_info_use_paragraph: We use the personal information you provide to process your orders, communicate with you, improve our products and services, personalize your shopping experience, and send you promotional materials, newsletters, or other marketing communications with your consent.
terms.usage_info_use_paragraph: The non-personal information we collect helps us analyze trends, administer our website, track user movements, and gather demographic information to improve our site's functionality and tailor our offerings to better meet your needs.
terms.data_security_paragraph: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, please note that no data transmission over the internet or electronic storage method is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
terms.your_choices_paragraph: You have the right to access, update, and delete your personal information. You can also choose to opt-out of receiving marketing communications from us by following the instructions provided in our emails or by contacting our customer support.
terms.changes_paragraph: We reserve the right to modify or update this Terms at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page with the updated date. We encourage you to review this Terms periodically for any updates.
terms.contact_paragraph: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Terms or our privacy practices, please contact us using the information below:

faq.how_can_i_track_my_order: How can I track my order?
faq.return_policy_answer: FREE UAE RETURNS - 14 Days. We want to ensure you are always happy with your TGM products. As such, we offer returns up to 14 days after we receive your items. Please note that we can only accept returns for unworn items, returned with the tags on in the bag they were shipped in. We will issue the refund within 48 hours of receiving the goods, the refund may take 5-7 days to reach you, depending on your bank's processing times. If your original payment method was cash on delivery, we can offer a store credit for the original amount.
faq.free_shipping_answer: Yes, we offer free standard shipping on orders over $50.
faq.track_order_answer: Once your order is shipped, you will receive an email with the tracking information.

about_us.container2_description: With over 500 different candy varieties, from classic favorites to limited editions, we offer the widest selection of Swedish sweets in the UAE.
about_us.container3_description: From personalized gift boxes to wholesale solutions, we tailor our services to meet your unique needs with exceptional care and attention.
about_us.container4_description: Join thousands of satisfied customers who trust Goodiset for their candy needs. We've built a community of sweet-loving enthusiasts.
about_us.container5_description: Whether you're ordering for yourself, corporate events, or wholesale, we offer flexible options including Build Your Box customization.

home.gcc_section_subtitle: Delivering sweetness across the Gulf region
home.features.delivery.text: Fast delivery across the UAE and GCC, with same-day in Dubai.
home.intro.p1: At Goodiset, we bring the authentic taste of Swedish candy straight to Dubai, UAE. Our premium Pick & Mix selection is filled with carefully selected treats made with non-GMO ingredients – and no Red 40. All our candies are halal-friendly, gelatin-free, and include a wide range of vegan options. We also offer plenty of sugar-free choices and a variety of delicious sour candy. Discover true Swedish classics like salty licorice and explore a candy experience crafted to inspire joy.
corporate.ready.feature2.title: Candy, Done the Clean Way
corporate.ready.feature2.desc: Experience authentic Swedish candy made without Red 40, using non-GMO ingredients and gelatin-free recipes.
privacy.contact_paragraph: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at info@goodiset.com or +971 54 700 0534
